'''jajutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ianthellid|ianthellid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-j-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ianthellid|ianthellid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jajutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæjitith|jæjitith]] || [[word:jæjitij|jæjitij]] || [[word:jæjitish|jæjitish]] || [[word:jæjiti|jæjiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jajujututh|jajujututh]] || [[word:jajujutuj|jajujutuj]] || [[word:jajujutush|jajujutush]] || [[word:jajujutu|jajujutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jajututh|jajututh]] || [[word:jajutuj|jajutuj]] || [[word:jajutush|jajutush]] || [[word:jajutu|jajutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jajuftuth|jajuftuth]] || [[word:jajuftuj|jajuftuj]] || [[word:jajuftush|jajuftush]] || [[word:jajuftuf|jajuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jajututhu|jajututhu]] || [[word:jajutuju|jajutuju]] || [[word:jajutushu|jajutushu]] || [[word:jajutuku|jajutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jajututh|jajututh]] || [[word:jajutuj|jajutuj]] || [[word:jajutush|jajutush]] || [[word:jajutu|jajutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jajututhul|jajututhul]] || [[word:jajutujul|jajutujul]] || [[word:jajutushul|jajutushul]] || [[word:jajutukul|jajutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jajututhuthu|jajututhuthu]] || [[word:jajutujuju|jajutujuju]] || [[word:jajutushushu|jajutushushu]] || [[word:jajutuku|jajutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jajututhun|jajututhun]] || [[word:jajutujun|jajutujun]] || [[word:jajutushun|jajutushun]] || [[word:jajutukun|jajutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jajututhuoro|jajututhuoro]] || [[word:jajutujuoro|jajutujuoro]] || [[word:jajutushuoro|jajutushuoro]] || [[word:jajutukuoro|jajutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
